title.arabic: تلقين المحتضر لا إله إلا الله

translations.en: Instruction for the one nearing death

text.arabic: من كان آخر كلامه "لا إله إلا الله" دخل الجنة

translations.en: Whoever dies with the last words (whose meaning is): "There is none worthy of worship but Allah" will enter Paradise.

items.reference: Abu Dawud 3/190. See also Al-Albani, Sahihul-Jami' As-Saghir 5/432.
